package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for type_assertion_without_comma_ok: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `v := i.(T)` without the comma-ok form in non-panic-safe code
type CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkModel
}

type CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkService struct {
    repo *CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOk(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkDTO) error {
    focus := "type_assertion_without_comma_ok"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    typed := []CaseTypeAssertionWithoutCommaOkDTO(items)
    _ = typed
    type_assertion_comma_ok_negative := map[string]int{"type": 1, "assertion": 2, "comma": 3, "ok": 4}
    type_assertion_comma_ok_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    type_negative_0 := type_assertion_comma_ok_negative["type"] + len(input)
    _ = type_negative_0
    assertion_negative_1 := type_assertion_comma_ok_negative["assertion"] + len(input)
    _ = assertion_negative_1
    comma_negative_2 := type_assertion_comma_ok_negative["comma"] + len(input)
    _ = comma_negative_2
    ok_negative_3 := type_assertion_comma_ok_negative["ok"] + len(input)
    _ = ok_negative_3
    return nil
}
